coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is where you get faster. Every interval raises your ceiling.

coachingNotes.MIXED: Hold this power steady. Your legs will argue — listen but don't give in.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is where you get faster. Every interval raises your ceiling.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: FTP-level work maximally stimulates neuromuscular recruitment and power.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Hold this power steady. Your legs will argue — listen but don't give in.
